name: TSAB
taglineEn: Community, culture, opportunities, support, and shared growth for Telugu students in Bhopal.
taglineTe: తెలుగు విద్యార్థుల కోసం కలిసే, ఎదిగే, తోడుగా ఉండే వేదిక.
headlineEn: A home for Telugu students in Bhopal
heroSupportingText: TSAB brings Telugu students together through community, culture, opportunities, support, and shared growth.
missionStripEn: Together we stand. Together we grow.
description: TSAB is a student-led community for Telugu students in Bhopal, built to create belonging, celebrate heritage, share opportunities, and support student growth.

homeThemes.title: Community
homeThemes.description: Meet Telugu students across Bhopal, feel at home, and stay connected through shared events and support.

homeThemes.title: Opportunities
homeThemes.description: Find internships, jobs, hackathons, resources, and useful updates that can help your academic and professional journey.

homeThemes.title: Culture & Heritage
homeThemes.description: Celebrate Telugu festivals, language, identity, and traditions through meaningful community events.

homeThemes.title: Support & Growth
homeThemes.description: Build friendships, gain confidence, learn from seniors, and grow through a strong student network.

aboutIntro.title: A student-led community that helps Telugu students feel connected, supported, and represented.
body: TSAB is a student-led community for Telugu students in Bhopal. It helps students feel connected, supported, and represented while building a strong network across campuses and institutions.
We bring students together through culture, events, opportunities, achiever stories, and community support. For many members, TSAB is more than a group — it is a familiar space away from home.
aboutIntro.whoCanJoinBody: Any Telugu student in Bhopal who wants belonging, support, cultural connection, opportunities, or a way to contribute to the wider community.
aboutIntro.familiarSpaceBody: TSAB should feel warm, simple, and useful. It exists so students can find people, get help, stay connected to Telugu identity, and grow together.

aboutMissionPoints: Build a strong and welcoming community platform
Share academic, career, and growth opportunities
Create a family-like environment away from home
footerTaglineEn: Together we stand. Together we grow.

joinActions.title: Join the TSAB Forum
joinActions.description: Enter the TSAB Forum to stay connected with opportunities, updates, and the wider Telugu student network in Bhopal.

joinActions.title: Volunteer with TSAB
joinActions.description: Help with website updates, social media, campaigns, events, and community communication.

joinActions.title: Submit media or memories
joinActions.description: Share event photos, videos, or recap material when the media submission path is ready.

joinActions.title: Nominate an achiever
joinActions.description: Recommend student stories and milestones that should be celebrated publicly by TSAB.
joinActions.label: See Achievers
